ui_bindings.description: Per-project wiki completion overview: status bands (ready/solid/outlined/gap), page counts, open questions. Backed by build_completion_dashboard.py + collect_open_questions.py.
Topic coverage + concept-coverage gaps + canon-drift summary per wiki. Backed by check_concept_coverage.py + build_canon_drift_report.py.
Integrate a new source into a wiki (extract, route, archive, log) per INGEST_PROCEDURE.md. Owner sees what was ingested; canon writes still require confirmation.
Semantic-lint pass over wiki content per SEMANTIC_LINT_PROCEDURE.md (terminology, reveal-conceit, cross-refs). System-facing maintenance surface.
Dashboard-driven maintenance pass (validators + aggregators). Runs update_dashboards.py orchestrator. System-facing.
Refresh a consuming wiki's infrastructure from the canonical Codex install (sync_from_kit.py: overwrite / merge-new / never-touched matrix). System-facing.
